title: nephrolepis hirsutula var. biserrata
intro: Nephrolepis hirsutula var. biserrata, also known as the hairy or biserrate Boston fern, is a type of evergreen fern with delicate fronds and a hairy texture. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits associated with Nephrolepis hirsutula var. biserrata include reducing fever, soothing irritated skin, and supporting respiratory health. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves can be made into teas, infusions, or topical applications to harness its medicinal properties.
